description: In July 2023, Meta launched Threads to compete directly with Twitter. The event triggered a massive, record-breaking migration event where users weighed the convenience of the Instagram ecosystem against the established culture of Twitter.

key_events.description: Threads reaches 100 million users in under a week.
Lack of browser support and chronological feed criticism begins.
Active user metrics drop significantly as novelty wears off.
Threads settles as a niche platform compared to Twitter's dominance.

calibration_notes: Excellent for measuring the difference between 'onboarding' success and long-term 'retention' success.
